noResults.comment: Header text when search or filter action has no results

valueNotFound.comment: Warning to display when selected value is not found in datasource for dropdown, combobox or multiselect

valuesNotFound.comment: Warning to display when multiple selected values are not found in datasource for multiselect
valuesNotFound.ja: 一部の値が見つかりませんでした

showingAllResults.source: Showing all results, type to filter more
showingAllResults.comment: When Select controls use remote filtering, and the current filter returns a small enough amount of data that all items can be shown
showingAllResults.de: Es werden alle Ergebnisse angezeigt. Tippen, um nach mehr zu filtern
showingAllResults.es: Se muestran todos los resultados, escriba para aplicar más filtros
showingAllResults.fr-fr: Tous les résultats sont affichés, tapez pour filtrer davantage
showingAllResults.ja: すべての結果が表示されています。さらにフィルタリングするには入力してください
showingAllResults.fr-ca: Showing all results, type to filter more

loadingFilteredResults.comment: Message to display while API is fetching results based on the user's filter
loadingFilteredResults.ja: フィルタ結果の読み込み中...
